resources.string:
No network connection available.

Please check:
• WiFi is enabled
• Router is connected
• Internet connection is active

Cannot reach shortwave radio map servers.

Possible solutions:

• Check your WiFi connection
• Try connecting to a mobile hotspot with VPN enabled
• Some receivers may be temporarily offline
• Network restrictions may be blocking access

If you're in a restricted network environment, connect through:
• VPN (Astrill, ExpressVPN, Surfshark)
• Shadowsocks / V2Ray / Trojan
• Mobile hotspot from a phone with circumvention tools

无法连接到短波电台地图服务器。

可能的解决方案：

• 检查WiFi连接
• 尝试连接已启用VPN的手机热点
• 某些接收器可能暂时离线
• 网络限制可能阻止访问

如果您处于受限网络环境，请通过以下方式连接：
• VPN（Astrill、ExpressVPN、Surfshark）
• Shadowsocks / V2Ray / Trojan
• 来自已安装翻墙工具的手机热点

注意：本应用不提供翻墙功能，需要您自行准备网络工具。
